# Gamepad Input

> Joystick/gamepad input and haptic feedback

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

Joystick/gamepad input and haptic feedback

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Device Detection** — when Enumerate connected gamepads is requested, then Enumerate connected gamepads completed.
- **Axis Input** — when Read analog stick/trigger values is requested, then Read analog stick/trigger values completed.
- **Button Input** — when Detect gamepad button presses is requested, then Detect gamepad button presses completed.
- **Vibration** — when Send haptic feedback to device is requested, then Send haptic feedback to device completed.
- **Device Mapping** — when Standardized input mapping is requested, then Standardized input mapping completed.
